# LeadLock AI Receptionist Website

This is a responsive, static sales website for LeadLock's AI receptionist offer.

## Preview locally

Open `index.html` directly in a browser, or serve the folder with any static web server.

## Files

- `index.html` — page content and structure
- `styles.css` — full visual design and responsive layouts
- `app.js` — call demo, ROI calculator, mobile menu, FAQ, and form interactions

## Before publishing

- Connect the demo form in `app.js` to your CRM or form endpoint.
- Replace the placeholder testimonial with an approved customer testimonial.
- Update the contact email, privacy policy, and terms links.
